texto: It knows you.Every soul is connected to it in the same way-nobody is closer farther.Doesn't matter what your beliefs were in that life or any of them.Only the soul can create distance between itself and what you call God...and almost every one of us does,at one time or another.Then we just have to learn how to bridge the distance and find our way home again.There are lots of different ways.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sheri Meshal sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “It knows you.Every soul is connected to it in the same way-nobody is closer farther.Doesn't matte…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, afterlife, religion, útil em momentos de religion e religious.

frase_original: It knows you.Every soul is connected to it in the same way-nobody is closer farther.Doesn't matter what your beliefs were in that life or any of them.Only the soul can create distance between itself and what you call God...and almost every one of us does,at one time or another.Then we just have to learn how to bridge the distance and find our way home again.There are lots of different ways.

texto: We see what we need to see,but we must remain open to new ideas and new ways of doing things.Progression of the spirit is the key to happiness,no matter where we are in the universe.One must develop one's soul and the spirit must grow,but we must seek growth.No one is going to force it upon us.A soul can remain a seed for as long as it wishes.It is entirely up to you.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sheri Meshal sobre temas ligados a espiritualidade. A afirmação “We see what we need to see,but we must remain open to new ideas and new ways of doing things.Prog…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a espiritualidade, soul, spirit, útil em momentos de spirit e spiritual.

frase_original: We see what we need to see,but we must remain open to new ideas and new ways of doing things.Progression of the spirit is the key to happiness,no matter where we are in the universe.One must develop one's soul and the spirit must grow,but we must seek growth.No one is going to force it upon us.A soul can remain a seed for as long as it wishes.It is entirely up to you.
